creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
meena@beasdix ~> pkg which /usr/share/man/man*/rdma* | head
/usr/share/man/man3/rdma_accept.3.gz was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/share/man/man3/rdma_ack_cm_event.3.gz was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/share/man/man3/rdma_bind_addr.3.gz was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/share/man/man3/rdma_connect.3.gz was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/share/man/man3/rdma_create_ep.3.gz was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/share/man/man3/rdma_create_event_channel.3.gz was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/share/man/man3/rdma_create_id.3.gz was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/share/man/man3/rdma_create_qp.3.gz was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/share/man/man3/rdma_create_srq.3.gz was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/share/man/man3/rdma_dereg_mr.3.gz was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-13.1.b1.20220313170121


meena@beasdix ~> pkg which /usr/include/rdma/* | head
/usr/include/rdma/ib_user_cm.h was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-dev-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/include/rdma/ib_user_sa.h was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-dev-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/include/rdma/ib_user_verbs.h was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-dev-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/include/rdma/mlx4-abi.h was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-dev-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/include/rdma/mlx5-abi.h was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-dev-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/include/rdma/rdma_cma.h was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-dev-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/include/rdma/rdma_cma_abi.h was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-dev-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/include/rdma/rdma_user_cm.h was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-dev-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/include/rdma/rdma_verbs.h was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-dev-13.1.b1.20220313170121
/usr/include/rdma/rsocket.h was installed by package FreeBSD-utilities-dev-13.1.b1.20220313170121

these files should be FreeBSD-rdma and FreeBSD-rdma-dev respectively.
but a FreeBSD-rdma-dev doesn't even exist.
